Fantastic Four Vol 1 (1961–1996)

Sign In to Save Save Edit
  • History
  • Purge
  • Talk (2)
Main Volume
Legacy Numbers
Publisher: Marvel Comics
Type: Ongoing Series (Team)
Genre: Super Hero
Featuring: Fantastic Four
Status: Finished
Publication Date: November, 1961—September, 1996
Marvel Unlimited: 416 of 416 issues
Creators by Number of Issues
The list bellow includes only major creators and some issues can have multiple creators, so the sum of issues by each creator may be different from the total number of issues in the volume
Writers:
Pencilers:
Stan Lee (125)
John Byrne (65)
Tom DeFalco (63)
Roy Thomas (36)
Steve Englehart (30)
Marv Wolfman (24)
Gerry Conway (21)
Walter Simonson (19)
Len Wein (14)
Doug Moench (11)
Roger Stern (10)
Bill Mantlo (8)
Jack Kirby (7)
Paul Ryan (7)
Archie Goodwin (5)
Jack Kirby (105)
John Byrne (74)
Paul Ryan (59)
John Buscema (52)
Keith Pollard (29)
Rich Buckler (29)
George Pérez (17)
Walter Simonson (13)
Bill Sienkiewicz (11)
Joe Sinnott (7)
Sal Buscema (6)
John Romita Sr. (5)
416 issues
2118 images
1 annual
416 reprinted issues
27 TPB editions
Next Volume

Contents

  • 1 Nos. 1-93 (1960s)
  • 2 Nos. 94-213 (1970s)
  • 3 Nos. 214-335 (1980s)
  • 4 Nos. 336-416 (1990s)
  • 5 Notes

Nos. 1-93 (1960s)

Available

"The Fantastic Four!"

Cover date: November, 1961
Available

"The Fantastic Four Meet the Skrulls from Outer Space!"

"The Menace of the Miracle Man"

"Prisoners of Doctor Doom!"
